title: Frozen Evaluation Manifest v2
description: Release-grade synthetic frozen evaluation set manifest (M30). Designed for calibration stability and relative evaluation, not absolute strength claims.

synthetic.description: Explicit flag indicating this is a synthetic eval set. Always True for v2 manifests.

selectionStrategy.description: Human-readable description of position selection strategy

positionCount.description: Total number of positions in this frozen eval set

provenanceRef.description: Determinism hash of the EvalSetProvenanceV1 artifact for this set

totalPositions.description: Total target position count (locked: 10,000 for M30)

minPerSkillBucket.description: Minimum positions per skill bucket (locked: 1,000 for M30)

stratification.description: Stratification configuration used for this eval set

countsBySkillBucketId.description: Position counts by skill bucket ID (keyed by canonical bucket ID)

countsByTimeControlClass.description: Position counts by time control class

countsByTimePressureBucket.description: Position counts by time pressure bucket

shardRefs.description: List of shard file paths relative to manifest directory

shardHashes.description: SHA-256 hashes of each shard file (keyed by shard_id)

determinismHash.description: SHA-256 hash of canonical manifest JSON for determinism verification
